mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, laboratory_id, reservation_time_id, reservation_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservations WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY reservation_date DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, laboratory_id, reservation_time_id, reservation_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservations WHERE laboratory_id = #{laboratoryId} AND reservation_date = #{date} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, laboratory_id, reservation_time_id, reservation_date, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservations WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY reservation_date DESC, created_at DESC
